title: German Cherry Strudel Flatbread
description: A sweet and crispy flatbread topped with a mix of cherry and german flavors, finished with a tangy fermented note.
instructions: Roll out the flatbread and spread the cherry jam over it.
Top the jam with chopped fresh cherries.
Drizzle the fermented apple cider vinegar over the cherries.
Sprinkle the German dark chocolate chips and crispy chopped pecans over the top.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the flatbread is crispy and the cherries are tender.
Let the strudel cool for a few minutes before slicing and serving.
